articles.title: Govt maintains diesel subsidy for Sabah, Sarawak amid cost pressures
articles.summary: KOTA KINABALU: The continuation of diesel subsidies for Sabah and Sarawak reflects the federal government's commitment to addressing the needs of the people in both states, says Datuk Mustapha Sakmud.

articles.title: Transporters call for faster payout of diesel subsidies citing liquidity crisis
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Transporters say the current diesel subsidy system, which requires upfront payment before rebates are issued, is pushing them to the brink of a liquidity crisis. Read full story

articles.title: Company directors in Penang lose nearly RM900,000 to phone scams
articles.summary: GEORGE TOWN: Two company directors in Penang have lost a combined total of nearly RM900,000 after falling victim to separate phone scam syndicates involving impersonation tactics. Read full story

articles.title: Security guard gets 10 years' jail, five lashes for raping disabled woman
articles.summary: JOHOR BARU: A security guard has been sentenced to 10 years in prison and five strokes of the cane by the Sessions Court here after pleading guilty to raping a disabled woman. Read full story

articles.title: Malaysia studying nuclear power to boost long-term energy security, says fadillah
articles.summary: PUTRAJAYA: MyPower Corporation Malaysia is undertaking a comprehensive assessment of Malaysia's potential nuclear energy programme, covering policy development, legal and regulatory frameworks, projec

articles.title: Heatwave expands in Peninsular Malaysia
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Heatwave conditions are spreading across northern Peninsular Malaysia, with more districts placed under Level Two (heatwave) alert as temperatures reach up to 40°C. Read full story

articles.title: SJK (T) Gopeng to get new building under RM14.5mil project
articles.summary: GOPENG: SJK (T) Gopeng will receive a new building to replace its dilapidated main block, which has suffered severe termite infestation and structural deterioration, under a RM14.5mil redevelopment pr

articles.title: Cops probe infant left at transmission tower
articles.summary: KUALA PILAH: Police have launched an investigation following the discovery of a newborn baby boy's remains near a transmission tower in Rembang Panas near here. Read full story
